affinity_cookie_ttl_sec.description: Defines the time-to-live for session affinity cookies in seconds. If set, the value must be a positive integer.

backend.description: Configures the backend services for load balancing, including settings such as balancing mode, capacity scaler, and connection limits. The 'group' field is required and must specify a valid backend group.
backend.type: list(object({balancing_mode: optional(string),capacity_scaler: optional(number),description: optional(string),group: string,max_connections: optional(number),max_connections_per_endpoint: optional(number),max_connections_per_instance: optional(number),max_rate: optional(number),max_rate_per_endpoint: optional(number),max_rate_per_instance: optional(number),max_utilization: optional(number),custom_metrics: list(object({dry_run: bool,max_utilization: optional(number),name: string}))}))

cdn_policy.description: Specifies the settings for Cloud CDN, including cache mode, TTL values, signed URL configurations, and cache key policies. Constraints and options depend on the object fields provided.
cdn_policy.type: list(object({cache_mode: optional(string),client_ttl: optional(number),default_ttl: optional(number),max_ttl: optional(number),negative_caching: optional(bool),serve_while_stale: optional(number),signed_url_cache_max_age_sec: optional(number),bypass_cache_on_request_headers: list(object({header_name: string})),cache_key_policy: list(object({include_host: optional(bool),include_http_headers: optional(list(string)),include_named_cookies: optional(list(string)),include_protocol: optional(bool),include_query_string: optional(bool),query_string_blacklist: optional(list(string)),query_string_whitelist: optional(list(string))})),negative_caching_policy: list(object({code: optional(number),ttl: optional(number)}))}))

circuit_breakers.description: Defines circuit breaker policies to protect against overload by specifying limits for connections, pending requests, and retries. Values must be positive integers.

compression_mode.description: Sets the compression mode for traffic, such as 'NONE', 'GZIP', or 'BROTLI'. Must be a valid compression type.

connection_draining_timeout_sec.description: Specifies the timeout duration in seconds for connection draining during backend instance removal. Must be a non-negative integer.

consistent_hash.description: Configures consistent hashing policies for session affinity, including options for HTTP headers, cookies, and ring size. Requires at least one valid configuration field.
consistent_hash.type: list(object({http_header_name: optional(string),minimum_ring_size: optional(number),http_cookie: list(object({name: optional(string),path: optional(string),ttl: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number}))}))}))

custom_metrics.description: Defines custom metrics for backend services, including the metric name and whether the configuration is in a dry-run state.

custom_request_headers.description: Specifies additional HTTP headers to include in requests sent to backends. Each header must be a valid string.

custom_response_headers.description: Specifies additional HTTP headers to include in responses sent to clients. Each header must be a valid string.

description.description: Provides a user-defined description for the resource. The value is optional and can include any string.

edge_security_policy.description: Specifies the security policy to apply at the edge for HTTP/HTTPS traffic. Must reference a valid security policy.

enable_cdn.description: Enables or disables Cloud CDN for the resource. Accepts a boolean value.

health_checks.description: Lists health check resources associated with the backend service. Each entry must be a valid health check URL or name.

iap.description: Configures Identity-Aware Proxy (IAP) settings, including OAuth2 credentials and whether IAP is enabled.

ip_address_selection_policy.description: Defines the policy for selecting IP addresses for backend instances. Must be a valid policy type.

load_balancing_scheme.description: Determines the load balancing scheme, such as 'EXTERNAL', 'INTERNAL', or 'INTERNAL_MANAGED'. Must be a valid scheme.

locality_lb_policies.description: Specifies custom locality load balancing policies or predefined policies for distributing traffic based on location.
locality_lb_policies.type: list(object({custom_policy: list(object({data: optional(string),name: string})),policy: list(object({name: string}))}))

locality_lb_policy.description: Sets the locality load balancing policy, such as 'ROUND_ROBIN' or 'LEAST_CONNECTIONS'. Must be a valid policy.

log_config.description: Configures logging settings, including whether logging is enabled and the sample rate for logs. Sample rate must be a decimal between 0 and 1.

name.description: Specifies the name of the resource. This value is required and must be unique within the project.

outlier_detection.description: Configures outlier detection settings to identify and remove unhealthy backends. Includes thresholds for errors, retries, and success rates.
outlier_detection.type: list(object({consecutive_errors: optional(number),consecutive_gateway_failure: optional(number),enforcing_consecutive_errors: optional(number),enforcing_consecutive_gateway_failure: optional(number),enforcing_success_rate: optional(number),max_ejection_percent: optional(number),success_rate_minimum_hosts: optional(number),success_rate_request_volume: optional(number),success_rate_stdev_factor: optional(number),base_ejection_time: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number})),interval: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number}))}))

port_name.description: Specifies the name of the port used for the backend service. Must match the port name defined in the backend instance group.

protocol.description: Defines the protocol used for communication, such as 'HTTP', 'HTTPS', or 'TCP'. Must be a valid protocol.

security_policy.description: Specifies the security policy to apply to the backend service. Must reference an existing security policy.

security_settings.description: Configures security settings such as TLS policies, subject alternative names, and AWS v4 authentication details.
security_settings.type: list(object({client_tls_policy: optional(string),subject_alt_names: optional(list(string)),aws_v4_authentication: list(object({access_key: optional(string),access_key_id: optional(string),access_key_version: optional(string),origin_region: optional(string)}))}))

service_lb_policy.description: Defines the load balancing policy for the service. Must be a valid policy type.

session_affinity.description: Specifies the session affinity type for the backend service, such as 'NONE' or 'CLIENT_IP'. Must be a valid affinity type.

strong_session_affinity_cookie.description: Configures strong session affinity cookies, including the cookie name, path, and TTL in seconds and nanoseconds.
strong_session_affinity_cookie.type: list(object({name: optional(string),path: optional(string),ttl: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number}))}))

timeout_sec.description: Specifies the timeout duration for requests in seconds. Must be a positive integer.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeouts for resource operations such as creation, deletion, and updates. Values must be valid time duration strings.
